title: Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Weaving Studio

MENU

Weaving Studio

Our weaving studio is designed for the basic applications of
woven patterns. By doing basic weaving applications on dobby weaving looms, our
students can transfer the fabric pattern they designed in computerized weaving
software to the hand loom with the support of our expert lecturer. They learn
how to design a woven textile surface and recognize fabrics by improving their
knowledge and application skills in woven fabric design.
